problem id: f8640728
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) AND SHL(4)

examples:
  01001011 -> 10010000
  01000011 -> 00010000
  11001110 -> 10100000
  11001011 -> 10110000
  10010010 -> 00100000
  00010110 -> 00000000
  01011011 -> 10010000
  10011010 -> 10100000

query: 01001100
predicted answer: 00000000
